test_sufficiency_summary: Verified the test-only direct-dialog stabilization in tests/gui/TacticalGuiLiveTest.cpp, confirmed the parent-relative centering helper still only permits owning-top-level fallback, reran TacticalTests successfully (OK (92 tests)), and reran GuiTests successfully three consecutive times under GDK_BACKEND=x11 (OK (29 tests) each).
documentation_accuracy_summary: doc/DesignNotes.md now matches the shipped direct-dialog stabilization and the repeated GUI validation story without contradicting the implemented parent-relative centering behavior.
